{{Infobox event
|name=Alice becomes frustrated with the endless illogical banter and leaves the tea party in anger and disgust
|participants=Alice
|chapitre=7
}}

== Course of events ==

Alice became frustrated with the endless illogical banter at the tea party and left in anger and disgust. She had arrived uninvited and unwelcome at an afternoon gathering with the March Hare, Hatter, and Dormouse, following a warning from the Cheshire Cat that everyone at the March Hare's residence was mad.

Her departure from the gathering set in motion further events. Alice subsequently discovered a door in a tree, which led her back through the glass hall and into a beautiful garden with fountains.

== References ==

- Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

[[Category:Événements]]
